features.name: Monorepo Baseline Setup
features.description: Confirm the workspace installs, builds, and type-checks from the repo root using the documented verification path.
features.evidence: Verified from repo root on 2026-06-21 with ./init.sh. Workspace install, backend build, admin build, storefront typecheck, and storefront build all completed successfully.

features.name: Backend API Foundation
features.description: Establish the Hono API structure in apps/backend, including route organization and Cloudflare Worker bindings needed for ecommerce features.
features.evidence: Implemented backend route structure for ecommerce catalog work in apps/backend, including /api/products and /api/product-metadata, and verified with pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, and ./init.sh on 2026-06-21.

features.name: Data Layer With Drizzle And D1
features.description: Introduce Drizzle schema, migrations, and Cloudflare D1 bindings only after the backend structure is in place.
features.evidence: Added product catalog Drizzle tables, generated apps/backend/drizzle/0001_modern_boom_boom.sql, applied the migration locally with pnpm --filter backend db:migrate:local, and verified the repo with ./init.sh on 2026-06-21.

features.name: Admin App Router Migration
features.description: Move the admin app from starter content toward a React Router-based internal application shell and first operational screens.
features.evidence: Expanded the admin SPA through 2026-06-25 with routes for orders, products, collections, categories, inventory, customers, promotions, price-lists, team, and settings. Added Better Auth login, backend CORS, Medusa-thin create product with variant media, and product detail page. Fixed variant media gallery on both create and product-detail pages on 2026-06-25: root cause was Radix UI FocusModal setting pointer-events:none on body — added pointer-events-auto to gallery overlay, backdrop click to close gallery, capture-phase Escape handler to close gallery (not FocusModal) on first press, and guarded FocusModal onOpenChange with variantGallery check. Product detail page had zero variant media support — added upload, thumbnail grid, gallery lightbox with Prev/Next navigation and filmstrip, and delete. Verified via browser testing, backdrop click test, Escape-two-press flow test, and pnpm --filter admin build. Flattened the shell to use `@medusajs/ui` primitives and moved the route into a `FocusModal` overlay above the products list to better match Medusa's modal workflow. Rebuilt the protected admin shell into a Medusa-style dark navigation rail with grouped primary navigation, nested `Products -> Collections/Categories`, bottom-pinned settings/account actions, and placeholder screens for unfinished commerce sections, and documented the sidebar design in `docs/plans/2026-06-23-admin-sidebar-medusa-design.md`. Verified with pnpm --filter backend build, pnpm --filter admin build, pnpm --filter backend db:migrate:local, direct local worker requests for bootstrap/sign-in/get-session/change-password/create-user/ban-user/set-user-password/revoke-user-sessions, direct OPTIONS preflight checks for /api/admin/auth/sign-in/username, node --check apps/backend/scripts/seed-admin.mjs, and ./init.sh on 2026-06-22, plus pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh again on 2026-06-23 and 2026-06-24 after the Medusa create-product UX implementation, thin-scope alignment, variant-media upload pass, shell refactor, `FocusModal` overlay refactor, and Medusa-style sidebar pass. Refactored sidebar into reusable medusa-style components (SidebarRoot, SidebarBrand, SidebarSearch, SidebarNav, SidebarNavItemRow, SidebarSection, SidebarSpacer, SidebarUserRow) in src/components/ui/medusa/sidebar.tsx with sidebar config extracted to src/lib/sidebar-config.ts. Sidebar now only shows real project features (Orders, Products, Customization, Team, Settings) instead of Medusa's full commerce sidebar. Refactored orders-list and order-detail pages (2026-06-25) to use @medusajs/ui components (Container, Heading, Text, Input, Table, Button, Badge) with lucide-react icons instead of custom HTML/CSS. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh. Also refactored products-list and product-detail pages (2026-06-25) to use @medusajs/ui components (Container, Heading, Text, Input, Table, Button, Badge) with lucide-react icons. Product detail now uses Container for section cards, Button with icons for actions, Badge for statuses, and inline Text for summary rows instead of custom PageHeader/SectionCard/SummaryRow/StatusBadge. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh. Also refactored placeholder-index page (collections/categories) to use @medusajs/ui components with lucide-react icons. Also refactored security (settings) and team pages (2026-06-25) to use @medusajs/ui Container/Heading/Text/Button/Badge components with lucide-react icons, replacing custom PageHeader/SectionCard/SummaryRow/EmptyState and raw button elements.

features.name: Storefront Commerce Experience
features.description: Build shopper-facing routes and data flows in the React Router storefront, integrating with the backend API once contracts exist.

features.name: Cup Customization And Production Artwork
features.description: Allow admins to define fixed customization blocks on cup previews, shoppers to fill those blocks through a form, and the backend to validate and export SVG/PDF production artwork.
features.evidence: Replaced shared custom-shapes-library with per-template vector drawing tool on 2026-06-27. Added VectorPointType/VectorPoint/VectorPath types and "vector" ShapeType; removed CustomShape/"custom_svg"/customization_shapes table/shapes API/ShapeLibraryDialog/useShapeLibrary. Implemented draw mode with click-to-add-corner and click-drag-for-smooth Bézier points, floating VectorDrawOverlay (Undo/Close/Cancel), live draw preview SVG. Edit mode: VectorPointOverlay with point-drag, Bézier handle drag, double-click corner↔smooth toggle, keyboard delete (selected point only). Inspector: VectorPointsTable for manual numeric editing. Updated cssShapeClip/shapeClipSvg for "vector" in admin, storefront, and backend. All 15 customization package tests pass; pnpm --filter admin build, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck all pass. Removed old design doc at docs/plans/2026-06-27-custom-shapes-library-design.md. Refactored the customization runtime and UI from the earlier zone+block draft to a clean block-only model on 2026-06-25. Shared contracts now expose template-level typed blocks, blockId-based layers, normalized preview-image-relative bounds, and block-based SVG/PDF export helpers. The admin block editor was then simplified to a dynamic per-type form: technical export fields were removed from the primary panel, text blocks now support fixed or shopper-selectable color/font-family options, block hide/unhide plus dependency-aware delete were added, and the editor now supports same-page Edit/Preview mode with isolated sandbox values that reuse the shopper-form rendering rules for draft testing. Preview text rendering now keeps text_single on one canvas line and preserves text_multi newline breaks. Icon and image renderable blocks now keep visibleWhen behavior while supporting both admin-provided preset choices and uploaded media values from the same block control/value slot. Admin placement editing now presents block geometry as move/resize only, with rotation disabled and resize persisted as width/height bounds rather than scale. Uploaded media now renders cover-fit and clipped to fixed block bounds, with crop zoom/pan metadata editable by dragging in storefront/admin Preview mode plus zoom controls, without changing admin-defined block geometry. Storefront rendering now honors hidden blocks and published text-style choices. Verification passes with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, `pnpm --filter backend build`, and `openspec validate cup-customization-production --strict`; the latest uploaded-media cover crop work was rechecked with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `openspec validate cup-customization-production --strict`. Fixed two issues on 2026-06-25 blocking the admin customization page: (1) `customization_template_revisions` table was missing `blocks_json` column causing 500 error on `GET /api/customizations/templates` — added via ALTER TABLE; (2) `ProductSelector` sent `limit=200` to backend which only accepts up to `limit=100` — changed admin to use `limit=100`; (3) added PRODUCTS_CORS_POLICY middleware for `/api/products` so admin cross-origin fetch works. On 2026-06-26, approved and committed `docs/plans/2026-06-26-customization-editor-ui-model-design.md`, created and implemented OpenSpec change `customization-editor-ui-model`, and replaced the block-only runtime with the editor model (`background`, `layers`, `formFields`) across shared contracts, backend routes, admin editor, storefront runtime, and preview exports. Verified with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization check`, `pnpm --filter backend check`, `pnpm --filter backend build`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, `openspec validate customization-editor-ui-model --strict`, and `./init.sh`. On 2026-06-27, created and implemented OpenSpec change `customization-editor-canvas-viewport` to add admin canvas Edit/View modes, direct zoom percentage entry, Figma-like pan in View mode, and fit-to-view focus; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`, `openspec validate customization-editor-canvas-viewport --strict`, and `./init.sh`. Also fixed admin Text layer dragging so canvas sample text is preview-only/non-selectable and editing remains inspector-only, fixed Text layer movement drift by using pointer-down geometry snapshots, and fixed Text drag center-Y conversion so the clicked text stays under the pointer while still omitting persisted text height. Admin Preview Image Shape uploads now support direct drag-to-pan inside clipped shapes, wheel/trackpad uniform zoom, reset crop, and shared cover-crop math; explicit Zoom, Pan X, and Pan Y controls were removed; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build` and `./init.sh`. Text Path now renders in admin editor and admin Preview using shared SVG path generation for preset and custom Bezier paths; verified with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization check`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, and `./init.sh`. Implemented OpenSpec change `customization-text-on-closed-path` for Figma-like Text on path using closed ellipse/circle paths from the Blocks panel; scope excludes open arcs and Pen mode, all 22 tasks are complete, and verification passes with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization check`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, `pnpm --filter backend check`, `pnpm --filter backend build`, `openspec validate customization-text-on-closed-path --strict`, and `./init.sh`. Remaining work includes backend asset hardening, draft/freeze workflow completion, export-profile/jobs, production font handling, and environment-specific deployment wiring. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 tightened admin Preview upload crop interaction so wheel/trackpad zoom scales around the pointer and rendering uses the current uploaded image URL/dimensions instead of layer data; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 updated admin Preview Image Shape crop interaction to support unconstrained movement, scale below cover-fit, four corner resize handles, and shape-only clipping when the image exceeds the shape; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 made admin Preview background and text layers non-selectable/non-interactive so uploaded image blocks remain clickable during crop editing; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 added admin Preview Edit/View modes: image handles only show after selecting an uploaded image in Edit mode, while View mode pans the canvas; mobile uses larger selected handles and the same mode switch; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 added Preview viewport zoom controls (`-`, percentage input, `+`, `Fit`) matching the admin editor pattern; zoom/pan is viewport-only and does not change crop values; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 added Atlassian Pragmatic Drag and Drop sorting for admin customization Layers and Form panels with drag handles, closest-edge insertion indicators, and visible destination position labels; verified with `pnpm --filter customization test`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, and `./init.sh`.
